feat.name: Spinebreaker
feat.text: You squeeze your opponent in a vicious bear hug, putting intense pressure on their nerves, joints, or other pain points. Attempt an Athletics check to Grapple a creature you have grabbed or restrained, with the following additional effects if you succeed.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.requirement: You have a creature grabbed or restrained.
feat.critical_success: The target is clumsy 2 until the end of its next turn and then is clumsy 1 for 1 minute.
feat.success: The target is clumsy 1 until the end of its next turn.
